---
name: Good first issue
about: Template for maintainers to open a starter contribution task
title: "[good first issue] "
labels: ["good first issue", "help wanted"]
assignees: []
---

## Outcome

Describe the concrete outcome expected from the change.

## Scope

- Keep the change small and focused.
- Avoid unrelated refactors.
- Prefer one package or one narrow flow.

## Suggested Files

- `path/to/file.go`
- `path/to/file_test.go`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] behavior is implemented
- [ ] tests were added or updated
- [ ] docs were updated if needed
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes

## Context

Include enough background here so a contributor can start without needing off-thread context.
